strings.Hotel_Barbie_start_dialog1: Hello, superstar! The doors of the Barbie Dream Hotel are officially open, and the pink carpet is rolled out just for you!
strings.Hotel_Barbie_start_dialog2: We have so many exciting challenges, stylish surprises, and glamorous rewards waiting. Jump into the event, claim your VIP suite, and let's create some fun together!

strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_ballroom_dancer_200: Grace in every step, the dance floor is all yours!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_black_barbie_1980: A groundbreaking icon, confidence looks stunning on you!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_day_to_night_1985: Business by day, glamour by night, you do it all!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_deluxe_hearing_aids: Your pink style feels right at home in the Barbie Dream Hotel. Talk about a perfect match!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_deluxe_pink_hair_20: We love your pink hair! And your outfit is SO deluxe!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_deluxe_prosthetic_l: Glamour at its finest, you were born for the runway!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_earring_magic_midge: Love your earrings! We knew you'd bring the style!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_fashionistas_diabet: Welcome, our fashion-forward friend! Wherever you go, style is sure follow!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_fashionistas_ken_he: Meet our beach activities expert - ready to welcome everyone to join the fun!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_game_developer_2016: Creating fun for everyone, let's play something amazing!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_golden_dreams_1980: Your golden style is just like you - warm, bright and ready to shine!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_great_shape_ken_198: Bringing fitness and energy to every workout. Time to get moving!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_malibu_1971: California sunshine is here, feel those good vibes Malibu-style!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_miss_astronaut_1965: Our space pioneer has landed, the stars are waiting!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_rockers_dana_1986: Bringing '80s rock energy, the stage is yours tonight!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_solo_spotlight_1960: Our glamorous jazz star, the spotlight is all yours!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_superstar_christie_: The disco queen is in the house, let's get this party started!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_teenage_fashion_mod: The first Barbie. You're a true fashion icon!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_totally_hair_1992: There's no denying it. Your hair is totally fabulous!
strings.barbie_dialog_barbie_western_stampin_199: The frontier spirit lives on. Time to saddle up!
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_ballroom_dancer_2006: Ready to crush it on the dance floor, this star shines in a sparkly red, one-shoulder ballroom dress with a ruffled hem, gold drop earrings, and gold dance heels. Her topknot hairstyle completes the champion look.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_black_barbie_1980: A majestic guest in a red dress with gold accents. She is a true symbol of confidence and glamour, especially on gala evenings.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_day_to_night_1985: Rocking a sharp business suit by day and a glamorous outfit by night, she relishes the hotel's immaculate blend of work convenience and evening relaxation.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_deluxe_hearing_aids_2: This guest rocks hearing aids and a pink denim look with accessories to match. Her relaxed yet stylish getup makes her fit right in at the Barbie Dream Hotel.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_deluxe_pink_hair_2024: This fashionista with wavy pink hair is ready to show off her deluxe style. A true runway icon.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_deluxe_prosthetic_leg: This guest brings Deluxe Style glam with a ruffle-trim pink set, statement jewelry, and a glittery pink prosthetic leg. She is fully ready for the runway.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_earring_magic_midge_1: With her signature red hair and mix-and-match charm earrings, this guest knows all about style. Her fellow hotel guests love when she hosts fun fashion workshops and accessory try-ons.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_fashionistas_diabetes: This stylish guest travels with her diabetes tech—a CGM on her arm and an insulin pump on her waist. She loves hotels where she can be active or lounge in style.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_fashionistas_ken_hear: This stylish version of Ken sports behind-the-ear hearing aids and a laid-back beach outfit. He leads water activities and makes sure everyone feels welcome to join in on the fun.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_game_developer_2016: A creative red-haired guest with a laptop and headphones. She curates the game lounge, VR corner, and digital fun for guests of all ages.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_golden_dreams_1980: A glamorous guest draped in gold from head to toe. She embodies the ultimate luxury lifestyle and knows exactly how to make every guest feel like a star.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_great_shape_ken_1984: An energetic Ken in a sporty gym outfit. He leads morning workouts and fitness classes, helping guests stay active during their vacation.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_malibu_1971: A sun-loving guest in a swimsuit and sunglasses. She loves checking out the pool, catching some sun, and sipping on smoothies, all to ensure the ultimate relaxed vacation vibe.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_miss_astronaut_1965: A space pioneer in a silver spacesuit. She is fascinated by the hotel's tech upgrades, innovative services, and "out-of-this-world" views.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_rockers_dana_1986: An 80s rock star in a bright, totally awesome outfit. Taking charge of the hotel's music program, she organizes epic concerts and sets the ultimate party mood.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_solo_spotlight_1960: A glamorous singer in a black evening gown. She brings an old Hollywood atmosphere to the lobby and loves performing onstage.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_superstar_christie_19: A glamorous guest with two-toned, sun-streaked hair and sparkling diamond jewelry. Dressed in a golden evening gown with a gold-sparkle stole, she is a true disco-era star who knows how to stand out on the dance floor.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_teenage_fashion_model: The original icon in her signature black-and-white swimsuit. She arrives to see the modern Barbie Dream Hotel and serves as a symbol of the brand's origin story.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_totally_hair_1992: An iconic 90s guest with "totally long" hair perfect for styling. A true legend of self-expression, she turns the hotel into her own glam hair studio.
strings.barbie_dialog_desc_western_stampin_1993: An adventurous cowgirl bringing the Western flair wherever she goes! She leaves cute boot and spur trail marks around the hotel, turning guest adventures into keepsakes.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_ballroom_dancer_20: Fun fact! Barbie has had more than 250 careers over the years, including many in the performing arts and dance in particular.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_black_barbie_1980: Fun fact! Black Barbie debuted in 1980, designed by Kitty Black Perkins, who drew inspiration from glamorous fashion icons like Diana Ross.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_day_to_night_1985: Fun fact! Inspired by more women joining the workplace in the 1980s, Day-to-Night Barbie goes from the office to a night out with a quick outfit change!
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_deluxe_hearing_aid: Fun fact! The first Barbie with behind-the-ear hearing aids launched in 2022 as part of the Fashionistas line.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_deluxe_pink_hair_2: Fun fact! Barbie continues to explore a wide variety of hairstyles and colors that change with fashion trends… including pink hair!
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_deluxe_prosthetic_: Fun fact! The first Barbie doll with a prosthetic limb was introduced in the 2019 Fashionistas line, created with input from disability activist Jordan Reeves.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_earring_magic_midg: Fun fact! Midge debuted in 1963 as a best friend to Barbie, and has been part of Barbie history for more than 60 years.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_fashionistas_diabe: Fun fact! The first Barbie doll with type 1 diabetes debuted in 2025, featuring both a continuous glucose monitor and insulin pump.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_fashionistas_ken_h: Fun fact! Since 1961, Ken continues to evolve—including a 2024 Fashionistas version with behind-the-ear hearing aids.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_game_developer_201: Fun fact! Barbie became a computer engineer in 2010 and continued her tech journey with Game Developer Barbie in 2016.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_golden_dreams_1980: Fun fact! Golden Dream Barbie debuted in 1980, and was revisited in the 65th-anniversary Fashionistas line.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_great_shape_ken_19: Fun fact! Ken debuted on March 11, 1961, was named after Ruth Handler’s son, Kenneth. Great Shape Ken remains one of the most iconic 1980s athletic-leisure looks.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_malibu_1971: Fun fact! Malibu Barbie was the first Barbie to look straight ahead instead of sideways.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_miss_astronaut_196: Fun fact! Barbie first went to space in 1965—four years before Neil Armstrong walked on the Moon!
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_rockers_dana_1986: Fun fact! Barbie and the Rockers grew beyond dolls into original pop songs and a 1987 TV special called “Barbie and the Rockers: Out of This World.”
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_solo_spotlight_196: Fun fact! Solo in the Spotlight debuted in 1960, and its black glitter gown became one of the most recognizable vintage looks.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_superstar_christie: Fun fact! Christie debuted in 1968 as the first Black friend to Barbie, and was later given the superstar treatement in 1977 with a brand-new Superstar Face sculpt.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_teenage_fashion_mo: Did you know? The first Barbie doll debuted on March 9, 1959 and originally sold for $3.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_totally_hair_1992: Fun fact! Totally Hair Barbie is the best-selling Barbie doll of all time with more than 10 million sold worldwide.
strings.barbie_dialog_funfact_western_stampin_19: Fun fact! The boots on Western Stampin’ Barbie really stamped trail marks on paper using rolling spur stampers and ink pads.
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_ballroom_dancer_2006: Dancing brings people together. Shall we?
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_black_barbie_1980: Confidence suits everyone. Let's celebrate tonight!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_day_to_night_1985: Work hard, play harder—that's my philosophy here!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_deluxe_hearing_aids_: This hotel is amazing! I have a feeling I'm going to like it here.
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_deluxe_pink_hair_202: Fashion is about expressing yourself. Love the vibe here!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_deluxe_prosthetic_le: Glitter, glamour, and lots of pink! That's my idea of a perfect check-in.
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_earring_magic_midge_: Accessories make the outfit! Want to try on some earrings?
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_fashionistas_diabete: I love places that are not just beautiful but welcoming, too!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_fashionistas_ken_hea: It's a great day for some surfing and beach volleyball! Who wants to play?
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_game_developer_2016: Gaming is for everyone! Ready to play something cool?
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_golden_dreams_1980: Luxury is in the details. This hotel has it down to a T!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_great_shape_ken_1984: Who's ready for a fun workout? Let's get moving!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_malibu_1971: Sun, sand, and good vibes—this is my happy place!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_miss_astronaut_1965: I've always dreamed of the stars, and this hotel is truly stellar! Innovation everywhere!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_rockers_dana_1986: Turn up the volume! This place needs some live music!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_solo_spotlight_1960: Every night deserves a little magic. Ready for the show?
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_superstar_christie_1: Who's ready to dance? I am!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_teenage_fashion_mode: I've seen fashion evolve for decades. Let's make some new memories together!
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_totally_hair_1992: Great hair, great mood! Where's the salon?
strings.barbie_dialog_guest_western_stampin_1993: There's so much to see here! I may need my horse to explore it all!

strings.message_descr_compensation: Thank you for contacting technical support. We have prepared you some compensation to help develop your hotel. Thank you for helping us become better.
strings.message_descr_compensation_for_event: Dear players, we have received a number of reports from you regarding the issue with receiving rewards for the latest in-game event. We have now fixed this issue. Please update the game to the latest version to receive your rewards!
strings.mexican_skin_is_locked: Win in the lottery or buy in the <color=#FFD608>Valentine's Day</color> event store
strings.minigame_tutorial_box: Get an additional reward for catching creatures.
strings.minigame_tutorial_timer: Catch creatures and get points. Finish in time to get a reward.
strings.monster_skin_is_locked: Win in the lottery or buy in the <color=#FFD608>Chasing Monsters</color> event store
strings.mummy_skin_is_locked: Log into the game for 30 days
strings.noads_popup_body: Remove <color=#ffeb08>forced ADS</color> interruptions. Rewarded videos will still be available.
strings.noads_popup_body_2: Remove <color=#ffeb08>forced ADS</color> interruptions. Rewarded videos will still be available.

strings.notification_descr_after_two_day_1: Come back and continue building it! 🏨
strings.notification_descr_after_two_day_2: 👷‍♂️ Come back and continue improving it! 💰

strings.notification_descr_daily_10: What will you be serving for dinner today? 😋 🥘 🥗
strings.notification_descr_daily_2: Time to hire a new staff member 🧑‍💼
strings.notification_descr_daily_6: Great companies are created by people who are always thinking about how to improve their business
strings.notification_descr_daily_7: Want to build one more room? 🏨
strings.notification_descr_daily_8: 🤩You have a great sense of style 🤌

strings.notification_descr_dailytask_start_1: ⏰ Right now's the time to complete them! 😋
strings.notification_descr_dailytask_start_2: Don't miss the opportunity to earn more! 🤑🏰

strings.offline_income_desc: Your hotel kept operating for {0} and earned revenue while you were offline!
strings.offline_income_doubler_bonus1_desc: Hire an accountant to increase the hotel's offline working hours
strings.offline_income_doubler_bonus2_desc: Train an accountant to increase the hotel's offline working hours
strings.offline_income_doubler_bonus3_desc: The accountant has reached the maximum skill level
strings.partymen_skin_is_locked: Get the <color=#FFD608>elite pass</color> in the <color=#FFD608>Beach Hotel fund</color>
strings.penguin_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward in the <color=#FFD608>Christmas Holidays</color> competition
strings.pet_item_desc_offer: Get a pet that follows you and collects money <color=#68FF00>FOREVER</color>
strings.pet_onboarding_bonus2: Your pet collects money and resources
strings.pet_onboarding_bonus3: You get the money collected by your pet
strings.pet_onboarding_bonus3_2: Your pet provides additional hotel income
strings.pet_onboarding_bonus4: Your pet makes your life better
strings.pet_rv_desc: Your pet follows you, collects resources, and earns <color=#68FF00>{n} cash</color> per minute
strings.pet_rv_desc_2: Your pet follows you and collects money
strings.piggy_bank_descr_can_buy: You can buy a piggy bank or save more gems.
strings.piggy_bank_descr_can_buy_noads: You can save more gems or buy the piggy bank and remove <color=#FFD608>forced ads</color> interruptions. Rewarded videos will still be available.
strings.piggy_bank_descr_cant_bought: Accumulate <color=#00FF38>{n}</color> gems and buy them at a bargain price!
strings.piggy_bank_descr_cant_bought_noads: Collect <color=#00FF38>{n}</color> gems in the piggy bank, buy it at a bargain price and remove <color=#FFD608>forced ads</color> interruptions. Rewarded videos will still be available.
strings.piggy_bank_descr_empty: Save gems in the piggy bank and buy them at a bargain price.
strings.piggy_bank_descr_empty_after_buy: Congratulations, you got a new piggy bank! Save gems and buy them at a bargain price!
strings.piggy_bank_descr_empty_noads: Save gems in the piggy bank. Buy it at a bargain price and remove<color=#FFD608> forced ads</color> interruptions. Rewarded videos will still be available.
strings.piggy_bank_descr_full: Buy the piggy bank at a bargain price!
strings.piggy_bank_descr_full_noads: Buy the piggy bank at a great price and remove <color=#FFD608>forced ads</color> interruptions. Rewarded videos will still be available.
strings.piggy_bank_descr_last_chance: Buy a piggy bank at a bargain price!
strings.piggy_bank_descr_last_chance_noads: Buy the piggy bank at a great price and remove <color=#FFD608>forced ad</color> interruptions and banner ads!
strings.piggy_bank_info_descr: Accumulate gems by collecting cash from hotels. buy the piggy bank at a bargain price by accumulating between <color=#00FF38>{n}</color> and <color=#00FF38>{n}</color> gems!
strings.piggy_bank_info_descr_noads: Save up gems by collecting cash from hotels. Buy the piggy bank at a bargain price by collecting between <color=#00FF38>{n}</color> and <color=#00FF38>{n}</color> gems! Remove <color=#FFD608>forced ad</color> interruptions and banner ads!
strings.premium_upgrade_popup_desc: Upgrade your room to a premium level and get nice bonuses
strings.prestige_popup_desc: Rebuild the hotel to get more money and tokens for improvements
strings.prestige_popup_desc_2: Rebuild your hotel and get the following benefits
strings.prestige_popup_desc_benefit_battlepass: More rewards in the hotel's fund
strings.raccoon_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward for the <color=#FFD608>Forest Friends</color> event
strings.robot_skin_is_locked: Get the <color=#FFD608>elite pass</color> in the <color=#FFD608>Moon Hotel fund</color>
strings.rocker_skin_is_locked: Get the <color=#FFD608>elite pass</color> in the <color=#FFD608>Festival Hotel fund</color>
strings.santa_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward for the <color=#FFD608>Christmas Holidays</color> event
strings.sguest_arriving_timer: The next guest will arrive soon
strings.sguest_desc_astronaut: One of the few who have been lucky enough to see the beauty of space
strings.sguest_desc_basketballplayer: Due to the perfect execution of his shots, slam dunk became his name
strings.sguest_desc_biker: Has spent more of his life on a motorcycle than in bed
strings.sguest_desc_chef: Chef of a very famous restaurant with a Michelin star
strings.sguest_desc_cowboy: The most accurate shooter in the Wild West, and maybe the whole world
strings.sguest_desc_dancer: Winner of the World Disco Dancing Championship
strings.sguest_desc_disinsector: His job is to rid you of biting, crawling, and flying creatures
strings.sguest_desc_exoticdancer: Graceful and passionate, she's the best belly dancer in the world
strings.sguest_desc_firefighter: Advocates for the regulation of dog-walking near fire hydrants
strings.sguest_desc_footballplayer: He once participated in a rodeo. It was the only time a bull dodged
strings.sguest_desc_germangirl: Behind that cute face are very strong arms that can hold 8 pints at once
strings.sguest_desc_ghost: Spends his nights floating around, looking for Wi-Fi and attention.
strings.sguest_desc_golfer: He's so good that he mows his lawn with a golf club
strings.sguest_desc_hockeyplayer: He's still looking for parquet flooring that won't get scratched by skates
strings.sguest_desc_hunter: If you need to find treasure in the jungle, he's your man
strings.sguest_desc_judge: He makes the most tender pork chops. How does he do it?
strings.sguest_desc_lumberjack: Capable of cutting through a meter-thick tree trunk in one blow of his axe
strings.sguest_desc_madscientist: His inventions rarely work as intended, but always explode beautifully.
strings.sguest_desc_mafia: A very serious person who has a great influence on everyone
strings.sguest_desc_mime: No stranger to invisible walls, he navigates glass labyrinths with ease
strings.sguest_desc_mondaygirl: Smiles like she's your friend, but steals your weekend every time.
strings.sguest_desc_monster: Looks terrifying but cries every time someone calls him "adorable."
strings.sguest_desc_mummy: Wrapped in mystery and linen—both extremely outdated but timeless.
strings.sguest_desc_musketeer: Complains that it is difficult to rent a house with a stable
strings.sguest_desc_nurse: She's such a professional that no patient has ever felt her injections
strings.sguest_desc_onemanorchestra: When it comes to performing music, he can't trust anyone but himself
strings.sguest_desc_plaguedoctor: Still believes that herbs and optimism can cure anything, even Mondays.
strings.sguest_desc_rapper: Set a record for rhyming continuously for 15 days straight
strings.sguest_desc_robber: Counts bank safes instead of sheep in order to fall asleep
strings.sguest_desc_rockstar: Has broken more guitars than anyone
strings.sguest_desc_samurai: Capable of cutting a raindrop twice as it falls to the ground
strings.sguest_desc_scarecrow: So dedicated to his job that even crows bring him snacks out of respect.
strings.sguest_desc_vampire: Drinks only premium blood types and never forgets to brush his fangs.
strings.sguest_desc_werewolf: Prefers night shift and never misses a full moon party.
strings.sguest_desc_witch: Her potions may turn you into a frog, but that's the best you can hope for.
strings.sguest_desc_wizard: Remembers thousands of spells, but forgot where he put the key to the tower
strings.sguest_desc_wrestler: His wife admitted that she had never seen him without a mask
strings.sguest_not_enough_candy_button: Buy the missing resources and continue?
strings.sguest_not_enough_cards_text: Open card packs to get more cards
strings.sguest_quest_bar: Order a special drink at the bar
strings.sguest_quest_restaurant: Order a special dish at the restaurant
strings.sguest_quest_welcome: Help the guest carry their luggage to the room
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_1: To upgrade your staff, you need a new currency — candy!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_1_barbie: To upgrade your staff, you need a new currency—shoes!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_1_new: To upgrade your staff, you need a new currency — candy!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_2: To unlock a guest, tap the Shop icon
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_2_barbie: A special guest has just arrived at our hotel! They can give us a valuable resource—shoes!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_2_new:
A special guest has just arrived at our hotel! They can give us a valuable resource—candy!
Let's give them a warm welcome!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_3_new: You've received a Guest Token! Use it to unlock more guests in the Shop.
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_4: All guest cards are stored in this section. Open it to take a look!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_5_new: All guest cards are stored in this section. Open it to take a look!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_6: A guest card upgrade is available! Let's upgrade your guest!
strings.sguest_tutorial_step_7_new: You can upgrade your guest now! Tap to make them even better.
strings.sguest_ui_reroll_desc: Reroll with an increased chance of finding a rare guest
strings.sguest_ui_tutorial_desc_2: The unlocked guest will be able to <color=#68FF00>visit your hotel</color>, and you'll get <color=#00FF38>rewards</color> for serving them.
strings.sguest_ui_tutorial_desc_3: A special guest has come to our hotel! Let's greet them properly.
strings.sguest_ui_tutorial_halloween_event_step3: Get more cards and pumpkins for guest upgrades
strings.sguest_ui_tutorial_step1: Collect cards and unlock new guests
strings.sguest_ui_tutorial_step3: Get more cards and candy for staff upgrades
strings.sguest_ui_tutorial_step3_new: Get more cards and candy for guest upgrades
strings.sguest_ui_warning_desc: If you move to another hotel, this guest will leave. Are you sure you want to exit?
strings.sguestbrb_ui_tutorial_step3_new: Collect more cards and shoes for guest upgrades
strings.sk_consent_popup_text:
Please accept our Terms of use and Privacy policy to proceed. By clicking Accept, you hereby confirm that:

1. You are above the age of 16.
2. You consent to the collection and processing of your personal data in accordance with Privacy policy.
3. You have read and accept Terms of Use.
strings.skier_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward in the <color=#FFD608>Mountain Hotel fund</color>
strings.sloth_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward in the <color=#FFD608>Forest Friends</color> competition
strings.support_popup_reward_descr: The support team has sent you a gift:
strings.ticket_onboarding_popup_2: Use the ticket to skip ads
strings.treasure_hunter_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward for the <color=#FFD608>Saint Patrick's Day</color> event
strings.turkey_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward in the <color=#FFD608>Thanksgiving Day</color> competition
strings.tutorial_marathon_step_1_1: The first reward is available. You can take it now or double it!
strings.tutorial_marathon_step_1_2: The first reward is available. You can take it now!
strings.tutorial_marathon_step_2: Log in to the game more often and get even more rewards!
strings.tutorial_new_marathon_step_1_1: The first reward is available. You can take it now or double it!
strings.tutorial_new_marathon_step_2: Log in to the game more often and get even more rewards!
strings.ui_GUI_ADS_offer_descr: Get the additional reward to develop your hotel
strings.ui_ads_choose_descr: We know ads aren't for everyone, so we offer an option to play without interruptions
strings.ui_animal_event_promo_descr: The <color=#FFE000>Forest Friends Event</color> has begun. Complete daily quests and get <color=#68FF00>rewards</color>!
strings.ui_battle_pass_tutorial_step_1: You’ve unlocked the hotel’s fund! Here you can earn rewards for progressing through the hotel. Tap to learn more!
strings.ui_battle_pass_tutorial_step_3: Want more rewards? Tap the button to learn how to unlock the special prizes!
strings.ui_cascade_tutorial_step_1: A new event is available — Cloud Travel! Tap the icon to begin your cloud adventure!
strings.ui_character_tutorial_step_1: You can now upgrade your character! Tap the icon to learn more!
strings.ui_chasing_monsters_event_tutorial_descr: Use blasters to drive away monsters
Get currency in the lottery and win prizes
strings.ui_chasing_monsters_promo_descr: <color=#1ABF02>Catch your first monster</color> to unlock the <color=#FF05F5>event store and lottery</color>
strings.ui_christmas2025_event_promo_descr: The <color=#FFE000>Christmas Holidays Event</color> has begun. Complete daily quests and get <color=#68FF00>rewards</color>!
strings.ui_christmas_event_goal_descr: <color=#8FFF00>Give</color> a candy cane to the elf
strings.ui_christmas_event_promo_descr: <color=#1ABF02>Give one candy cane to the elf</color> to take part in the competition and win <color=#FF05F5>prizes!</color>
strings.ui_cleaner_offer_baner_descr_2: Get the cleaning squad in every hotel
strings.ui_cleaner_offer_descr: Hire your CLEANING SQUAD once and keep them <color=#68FF00>FOREVER</color> in <color=#68FF00>every</color> hotel!
strings.ui_cleaner_offer_descr_6: Hire a CLEAN SQUAD once and keep them in every hotel forever!
strings.ui_cockroach_event_event_over: Event is over! Last chance to claim rewards
strings.ui_cockroach_event_inst_body: Collect rewards from the next <color=#1ABF02>{n} stages</color> right now!
strings.ui_cockroach_event_last_chanse_desc: If you close the window, you will lose all unclaimed rewards. Are you sure you want to exit?
strings.ui_cockroach_event_prem_body: Buy the Premium Pass to unlock the following rewards!
strings.ui_cockroach_event_promo_descr: Cockroach invasion! <color=#1ABF02>Catch the first cockroach</color> to take part in a competition and win <color=#FF05F5>prizes!</color>
strings.ui_cockroach_event_promo_descr_2: <color=#FF0000>ERROR.</color>\nTo access the event, restore your internet connection
strings.ui_cockroach_event_safe_desc_lock: Activate the Premium Pass and open the safe with endless rewards
strings.ui_cockroach_event_safe_desc_unlock: Get rewards from the Bottomless safe
strings.ui_cockroach_event_tutorial_descr_1: Get chemicals for developing the hotel
strings.ui_cockroach_offer_deskr: Arm yourself with the necessary supplies to catch more cockroaches!
strings.ui_compas_tutorial_step_1: Can’t find what to improve? Tap the compass — it will show you where an upgrade is available!
strings.ui_daily_new_tutorial_step_1: Open the Manager's Diary. Here you can claim daily rewards, complete quests, and achieve feats
strings.ui_daily_tutorial_step_1: Here you can complete tasks and earn valuable rewards. Tap the icon to check out today’s tasks!
strings.ui_endless_offer_lastchance_descr: Are you sure you want to quit and lose your progress through the stages?
strings.ui_event_info: Part of a limited time event
strings.ui_event_leaderboard_not_active: The Event Contest is temporarily unavailable. Unfortunately, you can't join the contest right now. We're aware of the issue and will fix it soon.
strings.ui_event_leaderboard_not_login_game_cent: To take part in the Event Contest, sign in with Game Center
strings.ui_event_leaderboard_not_login_play_game: To take part in the Event Contest, sign in with Play Games
strings.ui_event_leaderboard_step_1: The Event Contest is now available! Tap the icon to take part
strings.ui_event_leaderboard_step_3: Tap the button to join the Event Contest
strings.ui_gem_conversion_descr_1: Now, for ease of calculation, <color=#FFE000>1 gem turns into 10</color>. Don't worry, this won't affect how much of everything you can buy.
strings.ui_gem_conversion_descr_2: Now, for ease of calculation, <color=#FFE000>10 gems turn into 1</color>. Don't worry, this won't affect how much of everything you can buy.
strings.ui_halloween_25_event_collection_info: Part of a limited time event. Collect all the cards while it's active!
strings.ui_halloween_25_event_conversion_descr: Event currency will be converted to regular one at a 1:1 rate
strings.ui_halloween_25_event_end: The <color=#68FF00>Haunted Hotel</color> has closed its doors. Thank you for participating in the event. Here are your rewards
strings.ui_halloween_25_event_promo_descr: Develop your <color=#68FF00>Haunted Hotel</color> and get more rewards. Assemble unique collections
strings.ui_halloween_2_event_promo_descr: <color=#1ABF02>By helping bats</color>, you can participate in competitions and get <color=#FF05F5>rewards.</color>
strings.ui_halloween_2_event_tutorial_descr_1: Upgrade a hotel to get pumpkin juice
strings.ui_halloween_2_event_tutorial_descr_2: Collect enough juice to get a pumpkin
strings.ui_halloween_2_event_tutorial_descr_5: The more points you get, the better the prizes in competitions!
strings.ui_halloween_2_offer_desсr: A pumpkin pack to feed all the bats
strings.ui_halloween_event_promo_descr: Bats have infested the hotel! <color=#1ABF02>Catch the first bat</color> to take part in the competition and win <color=#FF05F5>prizes!</color>
strings.ui_halloween_offer_deskr: Arm yourself with the necessary supplies to catch more bats!
strings.ui_last_hotel_descr: This is the latest hotel for now. New hotels are coming in future updates. Stay tuned!
strings.ui_leaderboard_active_no_internet:
You can still earn points,
but leaderboard data will only update
once your connection is restored.
strings.ui_leaderboard_active_no_login_descr: You can still earn points, but contest data will only be updated when you sign back in.
strings.ui_leaderboard_active_no_login_game_cent: Not signed in to Game Center.
strings.ui_leaderboard_active_no_login_play_game: Not signed in to Play Games.
strings.ui_leaderboard_finish_descr: The Weekly Contest is over. Thank you for participating! Here are your rewards:
strings.ui_leaderboard_finish_no_login_game_cent: The Weekly Contest has ended. You're not signed in to Game Center—sign in to claim your rewards.
strings.ui_leaderboard_finish_no_login_play_game: The Weekly Contest has ended. You're not signed in to Play Games—sign in to claim your rewards.
strings.ui_leaderboard_no_internet_connection: <color=#FF1515>No Internet!</color>/nCheck your connection and try again
strings.ui_leaderboard_no_internet_connection_2: The Weekly Contest has ended. Check your internet connection to claim your rewards.
strings.ui_leaderboard_no_login_game_center: The Contest has ended. Sign in with Game Center to claim your rewards.
strings.ui_leaderboard_no_login_play_games: The Contest has ended. Sign in with Play Games to claim your rewards.
strings.ui_leaderboard_not_active: The Weekly Contest is temporarily unavailable. Sorry, you can't join the contest right now. We're aware of the issue and will fix it soon.
strings.ui_leaderboard_not_login_game_center: To take part in the Weekly Contest, sign in with Game Center
strings.ui_leaderboard_not_login_play_games: To take part in the Weekly Contest, sign in with Play Games
strings.ui_leaderboard_qualification: Want to earn rewards? Tap the button and join the competition now!
strings.ui_leaderboard_step_1: The Weekly Contest is now available! Tap the icon to take part!
strings.ui_leaderboard_step_2: Learn more about the contest rules here
strings.ui_leaderboard_step_3: Tap the button to join the Weekly Contest
strings.ui_leaderboard_timerefresh: The Weekly Contest is taking a breather! A fresh new leaderboard drops soon - get ready to climb it!
strings.ui_main_tutorail_step_1: Welcome! I've been waiting for you! Here it is — your first hotel. Tap it to enter and start your first tasks!
strings.ui_minigame_booster_added_poison_descr: Temporarily, <color=#68FF00>poison will not be consumed</color> when catching creatures
strings.ui_minigame_booster_battery_descr: Temporarily increases the catch area for creatures and movement speed
strings.ui_minigame_booster_car_capacity_descr: The limit on resource capacity is temporarily <color=#68FF00>removed</color>
strings.ui_minigame_booster_trap_descr: Allows you to instantly catch creatures that fall within the range of this booster (the range depends on the capture radius of the car)
strings.ui_minigame_double_items_title: Do you want to <color=#68FF00>double</color> your resources?
strings.ui_minigame_result_window_without_resour: You haven't collected the resources yet
strings.ui_minigame_tultip_lock: Mini game will be available at hotel <color=#5DB900>level {n}</color>
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_step_1: To complete a new building, you need a resource that can be obtained from an expedition. Go down to the basement to learn how to earn it.
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_step_2: For catching creatures, you get resources that are temporarily stored in the transport box. Keep catching creatures to earn more resources.
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_step_3: To continue catching creatures and clear the transport of resources, you can drop them off in the common box. All accumulated resources will be stored there.
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_step_4: For each attempt to enter the expedition, you are given a limited amount of poison. You can top it up using a special booster.
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_step_5: To go to the hotel, enter the special area or continue the expedition using a booster.
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_window_step_1: Go to the hotel basement and catch creatures
strings.ui_minigame_tutorial_window_step_4: Use boosters to get more resources
strings.ui_minigame_upgrade_capture_descr: Increase the number of grabs per attempt
strings.ui_minigame_upgrade_poison_power_descr: Increase the speed of catching creatures
strings.ui_minigame_upgrade_radius_descr: Increase the capture radius for creatures
strings.ui_more_gems_descr: Get more gems on your first purchase
strings.ui_new_tutorial_daily_quest_step_1: Go to the Daily Quests section
strings.ui_new_tutorial_daily_quest_step_2: These are Daily Quests. They refresh at the same time every day.
strings.ui_new_update_descr: <color=#FFF501>New version available!</color>\nPlease update the game to unlock new features.
strings.ui_not_login_game_center: Sign in with Game Center to access your messages
strings.ui_not_login_play_games: Sign in with Play Games to access your messages
strings.ui_patrick_event_bonuces_offer_descr: Get a <color=#68FF00>new skin</color> and <color=#68FF00>additional event points</color>
strings.ui_patrick_event_promo_descr: <color=#FFE000>Saint Patrick's Day</color> has begun! Complete daily quests and get <color=#68FF00>rewards</color>!
strings.ui_patrick_event_promo_descr_2: <color=#FFE000>Get the first reward</color> to take part in the <color=#68FF00>event</color>
strings.ui_patrick_event_title_add_points_title: Get a new skin and additional points
strings.ui_patrick_event_tutorial_descr_3: Get rewards with the event pass
strings.ui_patrick_event_tutorial_descr_4: Take part in competitions and win more rewards
strings.ui_patrick_event_tutorial_descr_step_1: These are daily event quests. They get refreshed at the same time every day, even if you're still in the process of completing them.
strings.ui_patrick_event_tutorial_descr_step_2: The first quest has been completed. Tap the button to claim event points!
strings.ui_patrick_event_tutorial_descr_step_4: The first reward is already available. Tap to claim!
strings.ui_patrick_event_tutorial_descr_step_5: To get more rewards, unlock the Premium Pass!
strings.ui_premium_quest_lock: Buy the Premium Pass to unlock
strings.ui_prestige_locked: Reach level {n} to redevelop the hotel
strings.ui_prestige_max: You have the max level of prestige
strings.ui_prestige_unlocked: Redevelop your hotel and increase the prestige level
strings.ui_progressive_locked_tooltip: Buy the offer to receive the reward
strings.ui_progressive_offer_cta_desc: DON'T MISS OUT ON YOUR <color=#FFE000>{n} GEMS</color>
strings.ui_progressive_offer_desc: Buy now to unlock everything you've earned
strings.ui_progressive_tutorial_1: Upgrade your hotel and earn stars!
strings.ui_progressive_tutorial_2: The more stars you earn, the more rewards you get!
strings.ui_progressive_tutorial_3: Buy anytime and collect everything you've earned
strings.ui_promocode_desc: Some items will become available as the hotel develops!
strings.ui_promocode_used: The code has already been used!
strings.ui_quest_hub_daily_task_descr: Complete all quests to claim the main reward
strings.ui_quest_hub_info_descr: In the Manager's Diary, you can earn lots of rewards for the following activities:
strings.ui_quest_hub_info_step_1: Login Gifts – Collect gifts just for opening the game
strings.ui_quest_hub_info_step_2: Daily Quests – Complete simple quests for extra rewards
strings.ui_quest_hub_info_step_3: Weekly Quests – Take on longer challenges for bigger prizes
strings.ui_quest_hub_info_step_4: Feats – Achieve major goals to get special rewards
strings.ui_resources_tutorial_step_1: You can increase the box capacity
strings.ui_resources_tutorial_step_2: Tap to increase the box capacity
strings.ui_reward_in_bank_tutorial_step_1: Claim your daily gift! A free reward is waiting for you in the Shop — just log in every day to get it!
strings.ui_shop_sale_descr: Get more gems for the same price
strings.ui_special_guests_upgrade_lock: Unlocks at the next hotel level
strings.ui_tgd_event_promo_descr: <color=#1ABF02>Feed the first turkey</color> to take part in the competition and win <color=#FF05F5>prizes!</color>
strings.ui_tgd_event_tutorial_descr_1: Get seeds for developing the hotel
strings.ui_tgd_offer_deskr: Buy food to feed more turkeys
strings.ui_tutorial_achievement_step_1: Go to the Feats section and explore it yourself
strings.ui_tutorial_daily_quest_step_1: Go to the Daily Quests section
strings.ui_tutorial_daily_quest_step_2: These are Daily Quests. They refresh at the same time every day, even if you're still in the process of completing them.
strings.ui_tutorial_daily_quest_step_3: Complete all quests to get the main reward
strings.ui_tutorial_halloween_event_step_1: The Haunted Hotel has opened nearby. Tap on it to enter and take part in the Halloween event!
strings.ui_tutorial_new_achievement_step_1: Go to the Feats section and explore it yourself
strings.ui_tutorial_new_daily_quest_step_3: Complete all quests to get the main reward
strings.ui_tutorial_new_weekly_quest_step_1: Go to the Weekly Quests section
strings.ui_tutorial_new_weekly_quest_step_2: These are Weekly Quests. They refresh at the same time every week.
strings.ui_tutorial_new_weekly_quest_step_3: Complete quests and get these rewards
strings.ui_tutorial_weekly_quest_step_1: Go to the Weekly Quests section
strings.ui_tutorial_weekly_quest_step_2: These are Weekly Quests. They refresh at the same time every week, even if you're still in the process of completing them.
strings.ui_tutorial_weekly_quest_step_3: Complete quests and get these rewards
strings.ui_update_tutorial_daily_quest_step_1: The Daily Quests window has been updated. Tap the icon to check it out.
strings.ui_valentine_event_end_descr:
<color=#FFE000>Valentine’s Day Event!</color>
has come to an end.
Thank you for playing and see you again!
strings.ui_valentine_event_goal_descr: <color=#68FF00>Give</color> the bottle of perfume to the cupid
strings.ui_valentine_event_promo_descr: Give <color=#68FF00>the bottle of perfume</color> to the first <color=#68FF00>cupid</color> to unlock the <color=#FFE000>event store</color> and <color=#FFE000>lottery</color>
strings.ui_valentine_event_tutorial_descr_3: Give bottles of perfume to cupids
strings.ui_valentine_event_tutorial_descr_4: Get currency in the lottery and win prizes
strings.ui_vip_tutorial_step_1: I’m on my way to personally check how you’re doing — and by the way, I’m bringing a bunch of money with me!
strings.ui_voting_avatar_descr: Help us pick the character's new look and earn a reward
strings.ui_whats_new:
The Barbie Dream Hotel has opened its doors!
Help Barbies run their dream establishment—meet iconic dolls, discover their history of pushing past boundaries, and collect exclusive skins along the way. Complete the event pass, top the leaderboard, or grab a promo code to unlock Ken.
Your most legendary hotel update yet is here. Come on, Barbie, let's go play!
strings.ui_wishes_tutorial_step_1: A guest has a special request! They want you to bring them a specific item. Tap to find out where this guest is located.
strings.ui_zone_unlock_descr_2: Upgrade your character and use vehicles to complete the task faster
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_1: Clean rooms, restock products and get resources in your backpack
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_2: Spend resources to unlock new zones and hotel rooms
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_2_1: Restock the WC and get coins when the guests use it
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_2_2: Spend coins to unlock new zones and hotel rooms
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_2_3: Restock the vending machine and get coins when the guests use it
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_3: Your staff also earns resources and puts them in boxes
strings.unlock_zone_tutorial_window_descr_4: Take resources from boxes to earn more!
strings.valentines_robot_skin_is_locked: Win in the lottery or buy in the <color=#FFD608>Valentine's Day</color> event store
strings.villager_skin_is_locked: Get as a reward for the <color=#FFD608>Thanksgiving Day</color> event
strings.withdraw_consent_popup_text:
You have currently given your consent to SayGames's disclosure of the advertising ID of your device to advertising network companies for the purpose of serving targeted advertisments in the game based on your personal preferences.
Please note that if you withdraw your consent, your user licence to use the App will cease automatically.
Are you sure you want to withdraw your consent?
strings.zombie_skin_is_locked: Get the <color=#FFD608>elite pass</color> in the <color=#FFD608>Haunted Hotel fund</color>
